meanings.definition: prepare for eating by applying heat
examples: can you make me an omelette?
fix breakfast for the guests, please

meanings.definition: transform and make suitable for consumption by heating
examples: These potatoes have to cook for 20 minutes

meanings.definition: tamper, with the purpose of deception

examples: The apothecary cooked the medicinal mixture in a big iron kettle

meanings.definition: having been prepared for eating by the application of heat
